goal: Allow load test max users up to 10,000 without changing dashboard UI.

changes.description: Use shared MAX_USERS constant for startUsers, maxUsers, stepUsers input max values.
Update clamping assertions and add test for 10,000 boundary.
Added follow-up TODO items for this request.

risks: Browser-based synthetic load is not a substitute for distributed load testing tools.
Very high step sizes can increase scenario count.
recommendation: Run dev CI and promote to main after CI pass.
